title: User can navigate back to the previous screen
test_steps: Click on the back arrow in the top left corner.
expected_result: The user is redirected to the previous screen.

title: User can add a profile photo
test_steps: Click on the placeholder icon for a profile photo. | Select an image from the gallery or camera.
expected_result: The profile photo is successfully added.

title: User can edit their profile information
test_steps: Click on the edit pencil icon next to the name 'Sam, 32'. | Enter new information and save.
expected_result: The profile information is successfully updated.

title: User can view their location
test_steps: Observe the location indicator showing 'San Francisco · 0 ft'.

title: User can view their online status
test_steps: Observe the green dot indicating 'Online for 2 minutes'.
expected_result: The online status is displayed correctly.

title: User can view the map
test_steps: Observe the map of the San Francisco area at the bottom.

title: User can add a new location
test_steps: Click on the pink circular button with a plus sign in the bottom right corner. | Enter a new location and save.
expected_result: The new location is successfully added.

title: User can toggle the online status
test_steps: Observe the green dot indicating 'Online for 2 minutes'. | Click on the green dot to toggle the online status.
expected_result: The online status is successfully toggled.

title: User can view their profile in offline mode
test_steps: Ensure the device is set to offline mode. | Observe the map and other profile details.
expected_result: The map and other profile details are displayed correctly in offline mode.

title: User can resume viewing their profile in online mode
test_steps: Ensure the device is set to online mode. | Observe the map and other profile details.
expected_result: The map and other profile details are displayed correctly in online mode.
